title: Classic Guacamole Avocado

seo.title: Classic Guacamole Recipe: Easy & Authentic Mexican Dip
seo.metaDescription: Learn how to make the best classic guacamole recipe at home! This easy, authentic Mexican avocado dip is perfect for any occasion. Get the full recipe now!
seo.h1: Classic Guacamole Recipe: The Best Authentic Mexican Dip
h2Headings: How to Make Classic Guacamole: Step-by-Step
Tips for the Best Guacamole Ever
seo.imageAlt: Bowl of fresh classic guacamole with tortilla chips, cilantro, and lime wedges
seo.imageCaption: Whip up this vibrant and creamy classic guacamole recipe for your next gathering!

description: Experience the vibrant flavors of Mexico with this authentic Classic Guacamole recipe. Creamy avocados are perfectly mashed with fresh lime juice, zesty onion, spicy serrano, and fragrant cilantro, creating a dip that's rich in tradition and taste. This simple yet sensational appetizer is guaranteed to be the star of any gathering, bringing a true taste of Mexican fiesta to your table.

ingredients.notes: finely minced, remove seeds for less heat

instructions.title: Prepare the Avocados
instructions.text: Halve the ripe avocados lengthwise, carefully remove the pit, and scoop the creamy flesh into a medium-sized mixing bowl. Ensure all avocado is removed from the skin.

instructions.title: Mash the Avocado
instructions.text: Using a fork or a potato masher, gently mash the avocado to your desired consistency. Some prefer a chunky texture, while others prefer a smoother, creamier dip. Do not overmix.

instructions.title: Add Aromatics and Herbs
instructions.text: To the mashed avocado, add the finely diced red onion, the minced serrano pepper (adjusting quantity for desired heat), and the fresh chopped cilantro. These ingredients provide the essential flavor profile.

instructions.title: Season and Combine
instructions.text: Pour in the fresh lime juice and sprinkle with sea salt. Gently fold all the ingredients together until they are well combined. The lime juice helps to prevent browning and brightens the flavors.

instructions.title: Taste and Adjust
instructions.text: Taste the guacamole and adjust the seasonings as needed. You may want to add more salt, a splash more lime juice, or a pinch more serrano for extra spice. Balance is key for perfect flavor.

instructions.title: Incorporate Optional Tomato
instructions.text: If you are using the optional deseeded and diced tomato, gently fold it into the guacamole at this stage. Be careful not to overmix, as this can make the guacamole watery.

instructions.title: Serve Immediately
instructions.text: Transfer the finished classic guacamole to a serving bowl. For best results and to maintain its vibrant green color, serve immediately with warm tortilla chips, fresh crudités, or as a flavorful accompaniment to your favorite Mexican dishes.

tips: To prevent browning, always leave an avocado pit in the guacamole or cover the surface directly with plastic wrap, pressing it down to remove air. This creates a barrier from oxygen.
For a truly authentic flavor, always use fresh lime juice, not bottled. For less heat, remove the seeds and veins from the serrano pepper, or substitute with a milder jalapeño.
Serve guacamole immediately for the best flavor and color. If storing, press plastic wrap directly onto the surface to prevent oxidation and refrigerate for up to one day; stir before serving.
article: Classic Guacamole Avocado is a beloved Mexican Appetizers dish enjoyed across Mexican. This authentic recipe brings traditional flavors to your kitchen.
